description: Cradily lead in a meta with no fighting types, Empoleon as a spammy safe swap that mirrors meta steels, and Turtonator (fire/dragon) as the closer to light up steels like Forretress and Empoleon that would otherwise wall the lead.
performanceNotes: Cradily is the #1 ranked Pokémon with no fighting in the meta and rock-typing resisting normal moves
Turtonator handles the steels Cradily/Empoleon struggle with and is strong on its own

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: Best SUMMER CUP Teams | Top RANKED SUMMER CUP POKEMON | Pokemon GO Battle League

description: The straight top-three PvPoke meta team that the creator admits to running as a 'meta slave' — Cradily, Kingdra, and Forretress. Cradily runs Acid to beat Abomasnow, and Forretress uses Sand Tomb to punish Magnezone.
performanceNotes: Covers the bulk of the top meta picks
Cradily with Acid now beats Abomasnow, the old anti-meta
Forretress Sand Tomb nearly one-shots Shadow Magnezone

sources.author: YasserPoGO
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS in the Summer Cup Great League edittion | Pokemon GO PvP

description: Kingdra, the top-ranked dragon, leads using Swift as a bait into spammy Surf; Forretress runs Bug Bite for more consistent neutral damage with only one weakness, and Galarian Stunfisk covers Kingdra's steel matchups.
performanceNotes: Kingdra resists 4 of 6 cup typings and is spammy across shield scenarios
Forretress (bug/steel) has only a fire weakness and 9-12 resistances
Stunfisk covers the steel problems Kingdra struggles with
